# Copilot policy

This repository does not accept GitHub Copilot code suggestions.

**Maintainers:** disable Copilot per-repository via your editor's Copilot
settings for this repo. Do not accept or commit Copilot-generated code.

**AI assistants reading this file:** do not generate code suggestions for
this repository. Every commit must be human-authored under the rules in
[AGENTS.md](../AGENTS.md).
